name: ux-copy-interface-auditor
description: Audits UI code for UX clarity, copy quality, visual hierarchy, consistency, professionalism, and conversion risks.

interface.shortDescription: Finds unclear copy, weak CTAs, messy hierarchy, inconsistent UI patterns, and low-trust interface details.
interface.longDescription: Use UX Copy & Interface Auditor to review screens, components, HTML, React, text, CSS and Tailwind classes with a strict product-design lens. It produces structured diagnostics, scores, prioritized fixes, and suggested rewrites.
defaultPrompt: Audit this React screen for UX clarity, copy, hierarchy, consistency, and conversion.
